objects.name: australia_tag_ob_june26
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
  `$distinct_id`,
  `$name`,
  `$email`,
  `$last_seen`,
  `$country_code`,
  `$region`,
  `$city`,
  `$GCID`
FROM read_files(
  'abfss://analysis@stgdpdlwe.dfs.core.windows.net/BI_OUTPUT/Marketing/Bar/Australia_Tag_OB_June26.csv',
  format => 'csv',
  header => true
)

objects.name: bi_ouput_v_dim_instrumenttype
objects.view_definition:
SELECT ct.CurrencyTypeID AS InstrumentTypeID
	 , COALESCE(di.InstrumentType , ct.Name) AS InstrumentType
	from main.general.bronze_etoro_dictionary_currencytype ct 
		LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT InstrumentTypeID, InstrumentType FROM main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_instrument) di
			ON ct.CurrencyTypeID = di.InstrumentTypeID
      group by ct.CurrencyTypeID 
	 , COALESCE(di.InstrumentType , ct.Name)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument asset class identifier: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto. FK to Dim_InstrumentType.

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

objects.name: bi_ouput_vg_etoro_emoney
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
  aa.Ind AS MIMO_Ind,
  aa.RealCID,
  aa.MarketingRegionManualName,
  aa.Country,
  aa.Club,
  aa.Regulation,
  aa.Date_MIMO,
  aa.EOM_MIMO,
  aa.MIMOPlatform,
  last_day(dc.FirstDepositDate) AS EOM_FTD,
  last_day(dc.RegisteredReal) AS EOM_Reg,
  aa.IsInternalTransfer,
  aa.IsTradeFromIBAN,
  aa.Currency,
  aa.MOP,
  aa.IsFTD,
  aa.AmountUSD AS AmountUSD_MIMO,
  row_number() over (partition by aa.RealCID order by AmountUSD DESC) Rank_Amount  
FROM
  (
    -- Deposit
    SELECT
      'Deposit' AS Ind,
      bddfmap.RealCID,
      dc.Name AS Country,
      dpl.Name AS Club,
      dr1.Name AS Regulation,
      bddfmap.Date AS Date_MIMO,
      last_day(bddfmap.Date) AS EOM_MIMO,
      bddfmap.MIMOPlatform,
      bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer,
      bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN,
      dc2.Abbreviation AS Currency,
      CASE
        WHEN
          bddfmap.MIMOPlatform = 'eMoney'
          AND bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer = 0
          AND bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN = 0
        THEN
          o.Fundingtype_Txtype_7
        ELSE dft.Name
      END AS MOP,
      bddfmap.IsPlatformFTD AS IsFTD,
      dc.MarketingRegionManualName,
      SUM(coalesce(bddfmap.AmountUSD, 0)) AS AmountUSD
    FROM
      bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms bddfmap
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked fsc
          ON bddfmap.RealCID = fsc.RealCID
          AND fsc.IsValidCustomer = 1
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_range dr
          ON fsc.DateRangeID = dr.DateRangeID
          AND bddfmap.DateID BETWEEN dr.FromDateID AND dr.ToDateID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc
          ON fsc.CountryID = dc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_currency dc2
          ON bddfmap.CurrencyID = dc2.CurrencyID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dpl
          ON fsc.PlayerLevelID = dpl.PlayerLevelID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation dr1
          ON dr1.DWHRegulationID = fsc.RegulationID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_fundingtype dft
          ON bddfmap.FundingTypeID = dft.FundingTypeID
        LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT
            mdt.TransactionID,
            CASE
              WHEN p.CID IS NOT NULL THEN 'OpenBanking'
              ELSE 'WireTransfer'
            END AS Fundingtype_Txtype_7
          FROM
            bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_dim_transaction mdt
              LEFT JOIN bi_db.bronze_moneytransfer_billing_transfers p
                ON lower(p.ExReferenceID) = lower(mdt.ReferenceNumber)
                AND p.TransferStatusID = 10
          WHERE
            mdt.TxCreatedDateID >= 20240101
        ) o
          ON o.TransactionID = bddfmap.TransactionID
    WHERE
      bddfmap.DateID >= 20240101
      AND bddfmap.MIMOAction = 'Deposit'
    GROUP BY
      bddfmap.RealCID,
      dc.Name,
      dpl.Name,
      dr1.Name,
      bddfmap.Date,
      last_day(bddfmap.Date),
      bddfmap.MIMOPlatform,
      bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer,
      bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN,
      dc2.Abbreviation,
      CASE
        WHEN
          bddfmap.MIMOPlatform = 'eMoney'
          AND bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer = 0
          AND bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN = 0
        THEN
          o.Fundingtype_Txtype_7
        ELSE dft.Name
      END,
      bddfmap.IsPlatformFTD,
      dc.MarketingRegionManualName
    UNION ALL
    -- Withdraw
    SELECT
      'CO' AS Ind,
      bddfmap.RealCID,
      dc.Name AS Country,
      dpl.Name AS Club,
      dr1.Name AS Regulation,
      bddfmap.Date AS Date_MIMO,
      last_day(bddfmap.Date) AS EOM_MIMO,
      bddfmap.MIMOPlatform,
      bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer,
      bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN,
      dc2.Abbreviation AS Currency,
      CASE
        WHEN
          bddfmap.MIMOPlatform = 'eMoney'
          AND bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer = 0
          AND bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN = 0
        THEN
          'WireTransfer'
        ELSE dft.Name
      END AS MOP,
      bddfmap.IsPlatformFTD AS IsFTD,
      dc.MarketingRegionManualName,
      SUM(coalesce(bddfmap.AmountUSD, 0)) AS AmountUSD
    FROM
      bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms bddfmap
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked fsc
          ON bddfmap.RealCID = fsc.RealCID
          AND fsc.IsValidCustomer = 1
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_range dr
          ON fsc.DateRangeID = dr.DateRangeID
          AND bddfmap.DateID BETWEEN dr.FromDateID AND dr.ToDateID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc
          ON fsc.CountryID = dc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_currency dc2
          ON bddfmap.CurrencyID = dc2.CurrencyID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dpl
          ON fsc.PlayerLevelID = dpl.PlayerLevelID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation dr1
          ON dr1.DWHRegulationID = fsc.RegulationID
        INNER JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_fundingtype dft
          ON bddfmap.FundingTypeID = dft.FundingTypeID
    WHERE
      bddfmap.DateID >= 20240101
      AND bddfmap.MIMOAction = 'Withdraw'
    GROUP BY
      bddfmap.RealCID,
      dc.Name,
      dpl.Name,
      dr1.Name,
      bddfmap.Date,
      last_day(bddfmap.Date),
      bddfmap.MIMOPlatform,
      bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer,
      bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN,
      dc2.Abbreviation,
      CASE
        WHEN
          bddfmap.MIMOPlatform = 'eMoney'
          AND bddfmap.IsInternalTransfer = 0
          AND bddfmap.IsTradeFromIBAN = 0
        THEN
          'WireTransfer'
        ELSE dft.Name
      END,
      bddfmap.IsPlatformFTD,
      dc.MarketingRegionManualName
  ) aa
    LEFT JOIN dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked dc
      ON aa.RealCID = dc.RealCID

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer identifier. Distribution key. Passthrough from sub-platform tables. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Customer registered country name or ISO code.

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.

columns.name: MIMOPlatform
columns.comment: Platform discriminator. Values: TradingPlatform (CFD/Stocks TP), eMoney (IBAN/wallet), Options (Apex/US Options via Gatsby), MoneyFarm (UK managed investment - FTD only, no withdrawals). Options is full delete/re-insert every run due to unreliable data arrival. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: IsInternalTransfer
columns.comment: Internal fund transfer flag. `ISNULL(f.IsInternalTransfer, 0)`. 1 = transfer between platforms (TP <-> eMoney), not an external deposit/withdrawal. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: IsTradeFromIBAN
columns.comment: eMoney-initiated trade flag. `ISNULL(f.IsIBANTrade, 0)`. Renamed from `IsIBANTrade` in sub-platform tables. 1 = deposit originated from eMoney IBAN. Always 0 for Options/MoneyFarm. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatus
columns.comment: Human-readable restriction state label.

columns.name: PlayerStatusID
columns.comment: Compliance and trading account status. FK to Dictionary.PlayerStatus. 1=Active/Registered (97.5% of accounts); other values indicate restricted, closed, banned, or special states. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: DesignatedRegulaiton
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation, matching production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.

columns.name: VerificationLevelID
columns.comment: KYC verification level. FK to Dictionary.VerificationLevel. Values: 0=unverified (34.2%), 1=partial (12.4%), 2=intermediate (6.2%), 3=fully verified (47.1%). Default=0. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Tier display name, which can be one of the following: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, or N/A.

columns.name: PendingClosureStatus
columns.comment: Human-readable label for the closure state, which can be No, Suggested for Closure, or Approved for Closure.

columns.name: ScreeningStatus
columns.comment: Internal code name for the screening outcome. Passthrough from ScreeningService.Dictionary.ScreeningStatus. Used in compliance reporting and case management. (Tier 3 - live data)

columns.name: LimitationDate
columns.comment: Native SQL date.

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date dimension key (integer YYYYMMDD or FK to Dim_Date).

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID - the cross-platform identifier linking RealCID to demo and external systems. Source: Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer (primary), Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT (fallback). (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: Regulation_current
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction. (Tier 3 - Ext_Dim_Country live data)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English

columns.name: VerificationLevelID
columns.comment: KYC (Know Your Customer) verification level. DEFAULT -1. Source: Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer.VerificationLevelID (BO). FK to Dim_VerificationLevel. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: PlayerStatus
columns.comment: Human-readable restriction state label

columns.name: PlayerStatusReason
columns.comment: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data -- apply RTRIM() for string comparisons. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.PlayerStatus)

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReason
columns.comment: Human-readable sub-reason label for player status

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Tier display name (e.g. Bronze, Silver, Gold)

columns.name: DateRangeID
columns.comment: SCD2 range key: 12-digit bigint = YYYYMMDD (row open date) + MMDDD (year-end MMDD, typically 1231). E.g., 202603101231 = open 2026-03-10, closes 2026-12-31. Join to Dim_Range for FromDateID + ToDateID. See section 2.1. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: RealizedEquity
columns.comment: Total account value including cash, positions, and pending cashouts. If History.ActiveCredit.RealizedEquity is non-zero, taken directly; otherwise TotalCash + TotalPositionsAmount + InProcessCashouts. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity)

columns.name: RealizedEquity_club
columns.comment: Computed value based on TotalCash, TotalRealStocks, and TotalRealCrypto (no SQL expression provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_poscount
columns.comment: Count of manual CFD open positions (no specific computation provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_amount
columns.comment: Amount of manual CFD open positions (no specific computation provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_leveraged_poscount
columns.comment: Count of leveraged manual CFD open positions (no specific computation provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_leveraged_amount
columns.comment: Amount of leveraged manual CFD open positions (no specific computation provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_unleveraged_poscount
columns.comment: Count of unleveraged manual CFD open positions (no specific computation provided)

columns.name: ManualCFDopen_unleveraged_amount
columns.comment: The amount of unleveraged CFD positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event and IsSettled indicates a CFD asset (0) and Leverage is the multiplier.

columns.name: ManualCFDCryptoopen_poscount
columns.comment: The count of crypto CFD positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, IsSettled indicates a CFD asset (0), and PositionID is a unique trade position key.

columns.name: ManualCFDCryptoopen_amount
columns.comment: The amount of crypto CFD positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, IsSettled indicates a CFD asset (0), and Amount is the position or ledger amount.

columns.name: ManualRealCryptoopen_poscount
columns.comment: The count of real crypto positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, IsSettled indicates a real asset (1), and PositionID is a unique trade position key.

columns.name: ManualRealCryptoopen_amount
columns.comment: The amount of real crypto positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, IsSettled indicates a real asset (1), and Amount is the position or ledger amount.

columns.name: ManualETFopen_poscount
columns.comment: The count of ETF positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event and InstrumentTypeID indicates an ETF asset class.

columns.name: ManualETFopen_amount
columns.comment: The amount of ETF positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, Amount is the position or ledger amount (>= 0), and InstrumentTypeID indicates an ETF asset class.

columns.name: ManualStocksopen_poscount
columns.comment: The count of stock positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event and InstrumentTypeID indicates a stock asset class.

columns.name: ManualStocksopen_amount
columns.comment: The amount of stock positions opened, where ActionTypeID classifies the event, Amount is the position or ledger amount (>= 0), and InstrumentTypeID indicates a stock asset class.

columns.name: Deposit_Amount
columns.comment: The amount deposited, where ActionTypeID classifies the event as a deposit and Amount is the deposit amount (>= 0).

columns.name: Cashout_Amount
columns.comment: The amount cashed out, where ActionTypeID classifies the event as a cashout and Amount is the cashout amount (>= 0).

columns.name: ManualCFD_Commissions
columns.comment: Net commission for manual trades (IsMirror=0) that are CFDs (IsSettled=0).

columns.name: ManualCFD_FullCommissions
columns.comment: Gross full commission for manual trades (IsMirror=0) that are CFDs (IsSettled=0).

columns.name: ManualCFD_CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Raw commission on closed manual CFD trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0, ActionTypeID IN 4,5,6,28,40).

columns.name: ManualCFD_FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Gross full commission on closed manual CFD trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0).

columns.name: ManualCFDcrypto_Commissions
columns.comment: Net commission for manual CFD crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualCFDcrypto_FullCommissions
columns.comment: Gross full commission for manual CFD crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualCFDcrypto_CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Raw commission on closed manual CFD crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualCFDcrypto_FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Gross full commission on closed manual CFD crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=0, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualRealcrypto_Commissions
columns.comment: Net commission for manual real crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualRealcrypto_FullCommissions
columns.comment: Gross full commission for manual real crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualRealcrypto_CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Raw commission on closed manual real crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualRealcrypto_FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Gross full commission on closed manual real crypto trades (IsMirror=0, IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10).

columns.name: ManualStocks_Commissions
columns.comment: Net commission for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is Stocks (InstrumentTypeID = 5).

columns.name: ManualStocks_FullCommissions
columns.comment: Gross full commission for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is Stocks (InstrumentTypeID = 5).

columns.name: ManualStocks_CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Raw commission on closed positions for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is Stocks (InstrumentTypeID = 5) and action type is in (4,5,6,28,40).

columns.name: ManualStocks_FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Gross full commission on closed positions for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is Stocks (InstrumentTypeID = 5).

columns.name: ManualETF_Commissions
columns.comment: Net commission for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is not specified, but likely ETFs.

columns.name: ManualETF_FullCommissions
columns.comment: Gross full commission for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is not specified, but likely ETFs.

columns.name: ManualETF_CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Raw commission on closed positions for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is not specified, but likely ETFs, and action type is in (4,5,6,28,40).

columns.name: ManualETF_FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Gross full commission on closed positions for manual trades (IsMirror = 0) where instrument type is not specified, but likely ETFs.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID, a platform-internal primary key assigned at registration.

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: DWH-computed: 1 when not Popular Investor (PlayerLevelID != 4), not label 30/26, and not CountryID=250. Used in reporting to filter out non-standard customers. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Current regulation short code used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards.

columns.name: DesignatedRegulation
columns.comment: Regulation short code used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards.

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction. (Tier 3 - Ext_Dim_Country live data)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: VerificationLevelID
columns.comment: KYC verification level. FK to Dictionary.VerificationLevel. Values: 0=unverified (34.2%), 1=partial (12.4%), 2=intermediate (6.2%), 3=fully verified (47.1%). Default=0. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: Is_V3_verified
columns.comment: Indicates if the KYC verification level is fully verified (VerificationLevelID = 3).

columns.name: Reg_Date
columns.comment: Account registration date, defaulting to the current date if not provided.

columns.name: V1_Date
columns.comment: Date the customer first reached Verification Level 1.

columns.name: V2_Date
columns.comment: Date the customer first reached Verification Level 2, backfilled from Level 3 if null.

columns.name: V3_Date
columns.comment: Date the customer first reached Verification Level 3 (fully verified).

columns.name: FirstManualCFDpos_Date
columns.comment: The UTC timestamp when a customer first opened a manual CFD position, based on ActionTypeID and IsSettled flag (1 = real asset, 0 = CFD asset).

columns.name: Didtrade_manualCFD
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer has traded a manual CFD, based on ActionTypeID and IsSettled flag (1 = real asset, 0 = CFD asset).

columns.name: FirstManualETFpos_Date
columns.comment: The UTC timestamp when a customer first opened a manual ETF position, based on InstrumentTypeID (asset class: 6=ETF).

columns.name: Didtrade_manualETF
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer has traded a manual ETF, based on InstrumentTypeID (asset class: 6=ETF).

columns.name: FirstManualStockspos_Date
columns.comment: The UTC timestamp when a customer first opened a manual stocks position, based on InstrumentTypeID (asset class: 5=Stocks).

columns.name: Didtrade_manualStocks
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer has traded manual stocks, based on InstrumentTypeID (asset class: 5=Stocks).

columns.name: Deposit_Amount
columns.comment: Amount of deposit event, where ActionTypeID classifies the event and Amount is the position/ledger amount.

columns.name: Cashout_Amount
columns.comment: Amount of cashout event, where ActionTypeID classifies the event and Amount is the position/ledger amount.

columns.name: NetDeposit_Amount
columns.comment: Amount of deposits made by customers, where ActionTypeID classifies a deposit event and Amount is the position or ledger amount.

columns.name: ManualStocks_opencount
columns.comment: Count of customer actions where ActionTypeID classifies an event and InstrumentTypeID indicates a stocks asset class.

columns.name: ManualETF_opencount
columns.comment: Count of customer actions where ActionTypeID classifies an event and InstrumentTypeID indicates an ETF asset class.

columns.name: ManualCFD_opencount
columns.comment: Count of customer actions where ActionTypeID classifies an event and IsSettled indicates a CFD asset.

columns.name: Curr_Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the current regulation.

columns.name: Previous_Regulation
columns.comment: Previous regulation short code used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards.

columns.name: Change_Date
columns.comment: Start date of a range in YYYYMMDD integer format.

columns.name: IP_Country
columns.comment: The full country name in English where the customer’s IP is located.

columns.name: Citizenship_Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English of the customer’s citizenship.

columns.name: Has_AdditionalCitizenship
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer has an additional citizenship, based on Global Customer ID.

columns.name: AdditionalCitizenship_Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English of the customer’s additional citizenship.

columns.name: POB_Country
columns.comment: Country of the customer’s place of birth, based on the Name from the dim_country table.

columns.name: PlayerStatus
columns.comment: Customer’s current restriction state, based on the Name from the dim_playerstatus table.

columns.name: PlayerStatusReason
columns.comment: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data -- apply RTRIM() for string comparisons. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.PlayerStatus)

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReason
columns.comment: Sub-reason for the customer’s current restriction state, based on the PlayerStatusSubReasonName from the dim_playerstatussubreasons table.

columns.name: ScreeningStatus
columns.comment: Internal code name for the screening outcome. Passthrough from ScreeningService.Dictionary.ScreeningStatus. Used in compliance reporting and case management. (Tier 3 - live data)

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Tier display name (e.g. Bronze, Silver, Gold) of the customer’s club level.

columns.name: FirstDepositDate
columns.comment: Date of first deposit. DEFAULT=’19000101’. Updated from CustomerFinanceDB FTD data with FTDRecoveryDate logic. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: FirstDepositAmount
columns.comment: Amount of first deposit (in USD). Updated from FTDAmountInUsd. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: Is_Shareholder
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer is a shareholder, based on Q32_Is_Shareholder.

columns.name: Is_Employed_By_Broker
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer is employed by a broker, based on Q32_Is_Employed_By_Broker.

columns.name: Is_Public_Official
columns.comment: Indicates if a customer is a public official, based on Q32_Is_Public_Official.

columns.name: Is_Vulnerable_Client
columns.comment: Indicates if the client is vulnerable based on Q50_Is_Vulnerable_Client.

columns.name: Sources_of_Funds
columns.comment: Answer text from question 26 (T2) related to sources of funds.

columns.name: Net_Annual_Income
columns.comment: Customer’s annual income based on Q10_AnswerText from the kyc panel.

columns.name: Planned_Invested_Amount
columns.comment: Amount the customer plans to invest, based on Q14_AnswerText from the kyc panel.

columns.name: Occupation
columns.comment: Customer’s occupation based on Q18_AnswerText from the kyc panel.

columns.name: Employment_Status
columns.comment: Part of composite PK. References KYC.Questions. Which question was answered. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, UserApiDB.KYC.CustomerAnswers)

columns.name: Employment_Status_AnsDate
columns.comment: When this answer was submitted. Used for audit trails and FirstUpdated calculation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, UserApiDB.KYC.CustomerAnswers)

columns.name: EV_MatchStatus
columns.comment: Human-readable EV match status label (None, PartiallyVerified, Verified, NotVerified). Resolved via Dim_EvMatchStatus. (Tier 2 - SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: EV_MatchStatusID
columns.comment: EV match status code. 0=None, 1=PartiallyVerified, 2=Verified, 3=NotVerified. Derived from History_BackOfficeCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs)

columns.name: EV_MatchStatusDateTime
columns.comment: Timestamp when the EV match status was recorded in BackOffice customer history. NULL if no EV process occurred. (Tier 2 - SP_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs)

columns.name: VendorPOA
columns.comment: Name of the vendor that processed the Proof of Address document (e.g., Onfido, Au10tix, Sumsub). NULL if no POA processing. (Tier 2 - SP_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs)

columns.name: VendorPOI
columns.comment: Name of the vendor that processed the Proof of Identity document. NULL if no POI processing. (Tier 2 - SP_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs)

columns.name: AMLComment
columns.comment: AML team free-text notes about this customer. Automatically date-prefixed by CustomerHistoryUpdate trigger when updated (prepends YYYYMMDD ). Contains investigation findings, source of funds notes, PEP status explanations. Up to 8,000 chars. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: RiskComment
columns.comment: Risk team free-text notes. Similar to AMLComment but for risk (not AML) observations. NOT tracked by the UPDATE trigger (excluded from History). Up to 8,000 chars. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: IsEDD
columns.comment: Enhanced Due Diligence required flag. 1 = customer requires deeper AML/KYC investigation (e.g., PEP, high-risk country, large transactions). 23,944 customers (0.13%) flagged. DEFAULT=0. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.

columns.name: UserName
columns.comment: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index). (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.comment: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index). (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: Club

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation, with values matching production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.

columns.name: Status

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year partition value injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID - the cross-platform identifier linking RealCID to demo and external systems. Source: Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer (primary), Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT (fallback). (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: PLChangeType
columns.comment: Club event type. IMPORTANT - dual naming: ’FirstClub’ (current SP, 14.9M rows) and ’First Club’ (legacy SP, 31.5M rows) both indicate initial tier assignment. ’Upgrade’ (2.2M): Sort improved. ’Downgrade’ (695K): Sort decreased. Always use IN or LIKE when filtering on first-assignment events. (Tier 2 - SP_ClubChangeLogProduct)

columns.name: IsUpgrade
columns.comment: Indicates whether the customer’s club status changed to a higher tier.

columns.name: IsDowngrade
columns.comment: Indicates whether the customer’s club status changed to a lower tier.

columns.name: IsFTC
columns.comment: First Time Club flag, 1 if the customer’s current tier is above Bronze and it’s their first promotion, 0 otherwise.

columns.name: CurrentTier
columns.comment: Current loyalty tier PlayerLevelID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer on the event date. FK to Dim_PlayerLevel. Non-sequential: 1=Bronze, 2=Platinum, 3=Gold, 5=Silver, 6=Platinum Plus, 7=Diamond. Use CurrentSort for ordering. (Tier 2 - SP_ClubChangeLogProduct)

columns.name: LastTier
columns.comment: The customer’s previous loyalty tier before the current change.

columns.name: FTDDate
columns.comment: Date of the customer’s first deposit.

columns.name: FTCDate
columns.comment: Business event date when the customer first achieved a club status.

columns.name: IsFTC_Status
columns.comment: Status of the customer’s First Time Club flag.

columns.name: DaysTillFTC
columns.comment: Number of days until the customer’s first time club date.

columns.name: DaysFromFTD
columns.comment: Number of days since the customer’s first deposit date.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation.

columns.name: ClubLevel
columns.comment: Tier display name (e.g. Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A).

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction. (Tier 3 - Ext_Dim_Country live data)

columns.name: Language
columns.comment: Language display name.

columns.name: PlayerStatus
columns.comment: Human-readable restriction state label.

columns.name: Type
columns.comment: Record type or category classifier.

columns.name: SubType
columns.comment: First sub-type refinement

columns.name: AccountManager
columns.comment: Staff member’s full name, combining first and last names (or indicates a functional/shared account if LastName is ’*’).

columns.name: RealizedEquity
columns.comment: Total account value including cash, positions, and pending cashouts. If History.ActiveCredit.RealizedEquity is non-zero, taken directly; otherwise TotalCash + TotalPositionsAmount + InProcessCashouts. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: SurveyResponseDate
columns.comment: Salesforce record creation timestamp.

columns.name: SurveyTakerDate
columns.comment: Salesforce record creation timestamp.

columns.name: CaseNumber
columns.comment: Salesforce auto-generated case number

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID. Join key to Dim_Customer (CID = RealCID). Combined with DateID forms the logical PK. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.CID)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

columns.name: ACC_TotalDeposits
columns.comment: Lifetime accumulated total deposits. (Tier 2 - Self-reference)

columns.name: ACC_TotalCashouts
columns.comment: Lifetime accumulated total cashouts. (Tier 2 - Self-reference)

columns.name: LastDepositDate
columns.comment: Most recent deposit date. From Fact_BillingDeposit via #fundingLast (ModificationDate). Updated daily for new deposits. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

columns.name: LastCashoutDate
columns.comment: Most recent withdrawal/cashout date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=8 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: LastPosOpenDate
columns.comment: Most recent position open date (manual or copy). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2) (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: ManagerID
columns.comment: Auto-generated unique integer identifier for each BackOffice staff member. PK for the entire BackOffice authorization system. ManagerID=0 is the reserved System account; ManagerID=1 is the bootstrap Admin. All BackOffice action tables (BackOffice.Customer, Task, Downtime, etc.) store ManagerID as the ’acting staff’ reference. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Manager)

columns.name: ParentUserName
columns.comment: Leader username at mirror creation. Denormalized for display; Trade.RegisterMirror passes from caller. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)

columns.comment: Primary key. Allocated by identity on INSERT via Trade.RegisterMirror. Referenced by Trade.Position.MirrorID, History.Mirror. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)

columns.comment: Datetime the copy relationship was opened (started). From Trade.Mirror.Occurred. Covers back to 2011-06-13 (first CopyTrader launch). (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: CloseOccurred
columns.comment: Datetime the copy relationship was closed. '1900-01-01 00:00:00' sentinel = still open (CloseDateID=0). For closed mirrors, this is History.Mirror.ModificationDate at the close event. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: CloseDateID
columns.comment: yyyymmdd integer of CloseOccurred. 0 = open mirror (active); > 0 = closed on that date. Primary filter for open/closed status. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulation short code, with values matching production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: 1 if the customer is a valid retail customer for analytics purposes. ETL-computed from PlayerLevelID, LabelID, CountryID. See section 2.2. Approx 98% of current rows = 1. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.comment: The deposit amount, which is a position or ledger amount with a discipline per branch, and must be greater than or equal to 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: NetDeposit

objects.name: bi_output_deltaapp_subscription_view
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
  data.user_id,
  data.event_date,
  data.account_id,
  data.event_origin,
  data.event_id,
  data.event_type,
  data.event_status,
  data.customer_id,
  data.product_id,
  data.price_id,
  data.subscription_interval,
  data.subscription_type,
  data.subscription_plan_id,
  data.period_start_date,
  data.period_end_date,
  data.trial_active,
  data.payment_amount,
  data.payment_amount_received,
  data.payment_amount_refunded,
  data.payment_currency,
  data.payment_method
FROM
  main.bi_db.bronze_deltaapp_bronze_subscriptions
  LATERAL VIEW
    EXPLODE(
      from_json(
        json_text,
        'array<struct<
            user_id: string,
            event_date: string,
            account_id: string,
            event_origin: string,
            event_id: string,
            event_type: string,
            event_status : string,
            customer_id: string,
            product_id: string,
            price_id: string,
            subscription_interval: string,
            subscription_type: string,
            subscription_plan_id: string,
            period_start_date: string,
            period_end_date: string,
            trial_active: string,
            payment_amount: float,
            payment_amount_received: float,
            payment_amount_refunded: float,
            payment_currency: string,
            payment_method: string
        >>'
      )
    ) AS data

columns.name: SpirePositionDate
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: WithdrawToFundingID
columns.comment: PK of Billing.WithdrawToFunding. Unique identifier for this withdrawal payment leg. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: cid
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.

columns.name: SellCurrency
columns.comment: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.

columns.name: ProcessCurrencyID
columns.comment: Currency in which the withdrawal was processed. References Dictionary.Currency. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: ProcessCurrency
columns.comment: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR" for forex; "AAPL.US", "TSLA.US" for US stocks (format: TICKER.EXCHANGE); "BTC" for crypto. Unique across all instruments. Use this for human-readable instrument identification. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency upstream wiki)

columns.name: WithdrawAmount
columns.comment: Withdrawal leg amount in ProcessCurrencyID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: EndForex_USDConversionRate
columns.comment: USD conversion rate at close from forex price snapshot.

columns.name: RefundAmountInDepositCurrency
columns.comment: The USD-equivalent amount of this withdrawal leg. Used in FX fee calculations in GetWithdrawToFundingFXFeeAmount. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: BaseExchangeRate
columns.comment: Market/interbank exchange rate (without FX markup) at time of processing. Used with ExchangeRate to compute FX fee spread. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: ExchangeFee
columns.comment: Raw FX fee value in the rate's decimal form. Used in BaseExchangeRate derivation (WireTransfer path): BaseRate = ExchangeRate - ExchangeFee/10^Multiplier. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: ExchangeRate
columns.comment: Exchange rate applied to convert the withdrawal to USD. The customer-facing rate including FX markup. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.

columns.name: WithdrawPaymentID
columns.comment: PK of Billing.WithdrawToFunding. Unique identifier for this withdrawal payment leg. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.vWithdrawToFunding)

columns.name: cid
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: TreeID
columns.comment: Copy-trade tree root. Independent: TreeID=PositionID. Copy-trade: TreeID=leader PositionID. All positions sharing a TreeID share SL/TP settings.

columns.name: DepositCurrencyID
columns.comment: Currency in which the deposit was made. FK to Dictionary.Currency (FK_DCUR_BDEP). Validated at insert time against Billing.DepotToCurrency to confirm the depot supports this currency. Indexed (i_CureenyID). 1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, 4=AUD, 5=GBP, etc. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: DepositCurrency
columns.comment: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR" for forex; "AAPL.US", "TSLA.US" for US stocks (format: TICKER.EXCHANGE); "BTC" for crypto. Unique across all instruments. Use this for human-readable instrument identification. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency upstream wiki)

columns.name: exTransactionID
columns.comment: External (provider) transaction ID returned by the payment processor. Set during DepositProcess via @ExTransactionID parameter. Used for provider-side reconciliation and dispute resolution. Indexed (BDEP_ExTransactionID). Also accessible via Billing.GetDepositByExTransactionID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: PaymentStatusID
columns.comment: Current payment status. FK to Dictionary.PaymentStatus (FK_DPMS_BDEP). Transitions validated by Dictionary.PaymentStatusStateMachine. Values: 1=New, 2=Approved (73%), 3=Decline (7.6%), 4=Technical, 5=InProcess, 6=Canceled, 7=Confirmed, 8=DeclineBlockCard, 9=DeclineBadBins, 10=DeclineMemberLimits, 11=Chargeback, 12=Refund, 13=Pending (4.1%), 14=DeclinedBlockedPayPal, 15=DeclinedBlockedNeteller, 18=DeclinedBlockedCountry, 19=DeclinedHighRiskCID, 20=DeclinedOverTheLimit, 25=MultipleDepositsAggregatedAmount, 26=RefundAsChargeback, 27=MigratedToDepositTable, 31=DeclineBinConflictCountry, 32=DeclineSecurityValidation, 33=DeclineFtdOverTheLimit, 34=DeclineHighRiskCountry, 35=DeclineByRRE (10.2%), 36=PendingReview, 37=ChargebackReversal, 38=RefundReversal, 39=ReversedDeposit. Indexed (IX_BillingDeposit_PaymentStatusID, IX_BillingDeposit_PaymentStatusIDFundingID, IX_BillingDeposit_PaymentStatusID_ModificationDate, Idx_Billing_Deposit_CID_PaymentStatusID). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: DepositDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of the most recent modification to this record. Set to GETUTCDATE() on INSERT (equals PaymentDate initially) and updated on every status change. Used by data pipeline queries (BDEP_ModificationDate index) to detect changed records incrementally. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: PositionOpenDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.

columns.name: DepositAmountOrigCurrency
columns.comment: Deposit amount in the deposit currency (CurrencyID). Stored as MONEY type (4 decimal places). Passed by the application in CENTS as bigint and divided by 100 on INSERT in DepositAdd: CAST(@Amount AS MONEY) / 100. For offline/wire deposits, may be updated during DepositProcess with @NewAmount. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: SymbolFull
columns.comment: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. (Tier 1 - Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: ETL-computed asset class label. CASE on InstrumentTypeID: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else Other. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: BuyCurrency
columns.comment: Trading symbol / ticker for the buy-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "AAPL.US". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via buy-side join. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency)

columns.name: SellCurrencyID
columns.comment: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 - Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: DepositTypeID
columns.comment: Type of deposit. FK to Dictionary.DepositType (referenced in DepositProcess). Values: NULL=legacy pre-type-classification, 0=unknown, 1=Regular (standard card/e-wallet deposit, 43.4%), 2=CvvFree (card deposit without CVV), 3=Recurring (scheduled recurring payment), 4=MoneyTransfer (internal transfer, cannot be FTD), 5=RecurringInvestment (recurring investment, 0.7%). ApplyFtd column in DepositType determines IsFTD eligibility. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: FlowID
columns.comment: Identifies the deposit flow/UX path used. NULL=legacy or default flow (98.9%). 1=new flow (0.97%), 3=specific flow variant (0.01%). Added by Dor Iz (18/04/2024, PAYIL-8362). Enables A/B testing of deposit UX flows and funnel analytics per flow variant. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ExchangeFeeInUSD
columns.comment: Exchange fee expressed in USD absolute amount. Complements ExchangeFee (which may be in provider-specific units) with a USD-normalized value for standardized reporting. Added for PAYIL-8913/8926 (Elrom B., 25/09/2024). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Copy-trade tree root. Independent: TreeID=PositionID. Copy-trade: TreeID=leader PositionID. All positions sharing a TreeID share SL/TP settings.

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.

columns.name: ReportDate
columns.comment: Business reporting date for this record (may differ from ETL insert date).

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number (ISO 6166). Unique 12-char alphanumeric code identifying a security.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID, a platform-internal primary key assigned at registration, unique within the etoro DB, used as a universal customer identifier.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)

columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: PriceEstimated
columns.comment: The estimated price, calculated using unrealized P&L in USD and position amount in USD, where the position amount is the size in instrument units.

columns.name: ReportDate
columns.comment: Business reporting date for this record (may differ from ETL insert date).

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number (ISO 6166). Unique 12-char alphanumeric code identifying a security.

columns.name: CID

columns.name: PriceEstimated
columns.comment: This column is not provided with a SQL expression or Origin meaning, but based on the source columns, it likely involves a computation using Unrealized P&L in USD (PositionPnL), Position amount in USD (Amount), and Size in instrument units (AmountInUnitsDecimal).

columns.name: ReportDate
columns.comment: Business reporting date for this record (may differ from ETL insert date).

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: Display name for UI, computed by combining buy and sell abbreviations (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD).

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number, required for stocks and unique to each instrument.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: CUSIP
columns.comment: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number -- 9-character code for US/Canadian securities. Used for clearing, settlement, and regulatory reporting. NULL for non-US instruments and instruments without CUSIP. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentCusip)

columns.name: AccountID
columns.comment: Account identifier within the trading platform.

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: FK to Trade.HedgeServer (implicit). Identifies which hedge server instance manages this position. HedgeServerID=1 dominates (713/738 rows = the primary production hedge server). Additional server IDs (5, 8, 9, 12, 222, 1100, 5454) represent test environments or secondary hedge server instances. RemoveBadNetting uses this column to clean up positions that appear under the wrong LiquidityAccountID for a given HedgeServer. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Hedge.Netting)

columns.name: LiquidityAccountID
columns.comment: First component of composite PK. FK to Trade.LiquidityAccounts - identifies which liquidity provider account holds this hedge position. In production, LiquidityAccountID=10 holds the dominant position (713/738 rows), representing the main execution account. Remaining accounts (2145-2152, 354541, etc.) are alternative or testing LP accounts. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Hedge.Netting)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: GapBalanceCalcVsOmni
columns.comment: The net aggregate size of the open hedge position in units of the instrument. 2 decimal places (vs 6 in ManualOrderExecutionLog) reflects that netting positions are rounded to avoid micro-lot accumulation. Used directly in PnL formula: Units (Bid - AvgRate) UnitMargin/Bid. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Hedge.Netting)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Real customer identifier (NOT anonymized). From BI_DB_PositionPnL via #posFCA. Use for de-anonymization of EU/UK custody books. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: EquilendID
columns.comment: EquiLend securities lending integration ID. Updated from StocksLending. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: 1 if the customer is a valid retail customer for analytics purposes. ETL-computed in Fact_SnapshotCustomer from PlayerLevelID, LabelID, CountryID. Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 1 - DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: IsCreditReportValidCB
columns.comment: 1 if customer is eligible for CreditBureau credit report validation. ETL-computed in Fact_SnapshotCustomer from PlayerLevelID, AccountTypeID, LabelID, CountryID. Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 1 - DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Traded instrument. Only stocks/ETFs (InstrumentTypeID 5,6) appear. FK to Dim_Instrument. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: The display name for the instrument, computed from the instrument’s abbreviation.

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: The International Securities Identification Number for the instrument.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: CUSIP
columns.comment: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number -- 9-character code for US/Canadian securities. Used for clearing, settlement, and regulatory reporting. NULL for non-US instruments and instruments without CUSIP. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentCusip)

columns.name: Currency
columns.comment: Trading symbol or ticker for the sell-side currency (e.g. "USD", "EUR", "GBX").

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server for the position. 16 distinct values. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: OpeningBalanceTotalCustodyUnits
columns.comment: Represents the total opening balance in units, which is split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceTotalCustodyUnits
columns.comment: Total size in instrument units of the position in custody, split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log.

columns.name: OpeningNonFCA
columns.comment: Represents the opening non-FCA balance in units, which is split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable.

columns.name: ClosingNonFCA
columns.comment: Size in instrument units of the non-FCA position, split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log.

columns.name: OpeningBalanceOmniUnits
columns.comment: Represents the opening balance in units, which is split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceOmniUnits
columns.comment: Size in instrument units of the position, split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log.

columns.name: CustodyOut
columns.comment: The amount going out of custody, based on trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short) and position size in units of the underlying instrument.

columns.name: CustodyIn
columns.comment: Amount of custody incoming, based on trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short) and position size in units.

columns.name: CustodyNetMove
columns.comment: Net change in custody position, based on trade direction and position size in units.

columns.name: CustodyOutAdjusted
columns.comment: The amount going out of custody, adjusted by the cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short) and position size in units of the underlying instrument.

columns.name: CustodyInAdjusted
columns.comment: Adjusted amount of custody incoming, based on trade direction, position size in units, and cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier.

columns.name: CustodyNetMoveAdjusted
columns.comment: The net movement in custody, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short) and position size in units of the underlying instrument, adjusted by the cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier.

columns.name: CustodyBalanceDelta
columns.comment: Change in custody balance, calculated using cumulative price adjustment multiplier and split-adjusted position size.

columns.name: IsGapBalance
columns.comment: Indicates whether there is a gap in the balance, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short) and position size in units of the underlying instrument.

columns.name: OpeningBalanceTotalCustodyUSD
columns.comment: Represents the total opening balance in USD, calculated using the amount in units and unrealized P&L.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceTotalCustodyUSD
columns.comment: Total size in USD of the position in custody, calculated using split-adjusted and rewound amount in units and unrealized P&L.

columns.name: OpeningBalanceOmniUSD
columns.comment: Represents the opening balance in USD, calculated using the amount in units and unrealized P&L.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceOmniUSD
columns.comment: Size in USD of the position, calculated using split-adjusted and rewound amount in units and unrealized P&L.

columns.name: LendingTotalOpeningBalanceUSD
columns.comment: The total lending balance in USD at the opening position, based on unrealized P&L and position amount.

columns.name: LendingTotalClosingBalanceUSD
columns.comment: The total lending balance in USD at the closing position, based on unrealized P&L and position amount.

columns.name: LendingAvailiableOpeningUSD
columns.comment: The available lending amount in USD at the opening position, based on unrealized P&L and position amount.

columns.name: LendingAvailiableClosingUSD
columns.comment: The available lending amount in USD at the closing position, based on unrealized P&L and position amount.

columns.name: IsMissingOpening
columns.comment: Indicates whether the opening position is missing for a customer, identified by their real customer identifier (CID).

columns.name: IsMissingClosing
columns.comment: Indicates whether the closing position is missing for a customer, identified by their real customer identifier (CID).

columns.name: NOP
columns.comment: Net open position in USD from units x pair rate x direction x conversion. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: UnitsWithSplitRatioClosing
columns.comment: Size in instrument units, adjusted by cumulative price adjustment multiplier to account for split adjustments, representing the closing position.

columns.name: PriceRatioClosing
columns.comment: Represents the cumulative price adjustment multiplier for the closing period, used to get the split-adjusted equivalent of a historical price.

columns.name: UnitsWithSplitRatioOpening
columns.comment: Size in instrument units, adjusted by cumulative price adjustment multiplier to account for split adjustments, representing the opening position.

columns.name: PriceRatioOpening
columns.comment: Represents the cumulative price adjustment multiplier for the opening period, used to get the split-adjusted equivalent of a historical price.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: IsRatio
columns.comment: Indicates whether a price ratio is applied, using a cumulative price adjustment multiplier (PriceRatio) to adjust historical prices.

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year partition value injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: ID
columns.comment: A unique identifier, potentially referencing a traded instrument or customer ID.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Real customer identifier (NOT anonymized). From BI_DB_PositionPnL via #posFCA. Use for de-anonymization of EU/UK custody books. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: EquilendID
columns.comment: EquiLend securities lending integration ID. Updated from StocksLending. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: 1 if the customer is a valid retail customer for analytics purposes. ETL-computed in Fact_SnapshotCustomer from PlayerLevelID, LabelID, CountryID. Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 1 - DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: IsCreditReportValidCB
columns.comment: 1 if customer is eligible for CreditBureau credit report validation. ETL-computed in Fact_SnapshotCustomer from PlayerLevelID, AccountTypeID, LabelID, CountryID. Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 1 - DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Traded instrument. Only stocks/ETFs (InstrumentTypeID 5,6) appear. FK to Dim_Instrument. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: Computed display name for UI, combining buy and sell currency abbreviations (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD).

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number, required for stocks (e.g., "US0378331005" for Apple) and NULL for forex, commodities, indices, and most cryptocurrencies.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: CUSIP
columns.comment: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number -- 9-character code for US/Canadian securities. Used for clearing, settlement, and regulatory reporting. NULL for non-US instruments and instruments without CUSIP. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentCusip)

columns.name: Currency
columns.comment: Trading symbol/ticker for the sell-side currency (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBX").

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server for the position. 16 distinct values. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: CustodyOutAdjusted
columns.comment: Position size in units adjusted by cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier for this period, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short).

columns.name: CustodyInAdjusted
columns.comment: Position size in units adjusted by cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier for this period, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short).

columns.name: CustodyNetMoveAdjusted
columns.comment: Position size in units adjusted by cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier for this period, considering trade direction (1=Buy/Long, 0=Sell/Short).

columns.name: CustodyBalanceDelta
columns.comment: Size difference in instrument units, considering split-adjusted and rewound positions, and price adjustments.

columns.name: IsGapBalance
columns.comment: Indicator of whether there’s a gap in balance, based on trade direction and position sizes.

columns.name: PriceEstimated
columns.comment: Estimated price based on unrealized P&L, position amount, and size in instrument units.

columns.name: IsZeroPrice
columns.comment: Indicator of whether the price is zero, based on the financial instrument identifier.

columns.name: OpeningBalanceTotalCustodyUSD
columns.comment: Total opening balance in USD, considering position sizes, unrealized P&L, and position amounts.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceTotalCustodyUSD
columns.comment: Total closing balance in USD, considering position sizes, unrealized P&L, and position amounts.

columns.name: OpeningBalanceOmniUSD
columns.comment: Opening balance in USD, considering position sizes, unrealized P&L, and position amounts.

columns.name: ClosingBalanceOmniUSD
columns.comment: Closing balance in USD, considering position sizes, unrealized P&L, and position amounts.

columns.name: LendingTotalOpeningBalanceUSD
columns.comment: Total opening balance in USD for lending, considering unrealized P&L, position amounts, and size in instrument units.

columns.name: LendingTotalClosingBalanceUSD
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD and position amount in USD.

columns.name: LendingAvailiableOpeningUSD
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD and position amount in USD.

columns.name: LendingAvailiableClosingUSD
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD and position amount in USD.

columns.name: LoansUSD
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD and position amount in USD.

columns.name: IsMissingOpening
columns.comment: Indicates whether the opening position is missing for a customer, identified by CID, the real customer identifier.

columns.name: IsMissingClosing
columns.comment: Indicates whether the closing position is missing for a customer, identified by CID, the real customer identifier.

columns.name: NOP
columns.comment: Net open position in USD from units x pair rate x direction x conversion. Passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL. (Tier 1 - BI_DB_PositionPnL)

columns.name: UnitsWithSplitRatioClosing
columns.comment: The size in instrument units at closing, adjusted for splits using the cumulative price adjustment multiplier (PriceRatio).

columns.name: PriceRatioClosing
columns.comment: The cumulative price adjustment multiplier at closing, used to adjust historical prices for splits.

columns.name: UnitsWithSplitRatioOpening
columns.comment: The size in instrument units at opening, adjusted for splits using the cumulative price adjustment multiplier (PriceRatio).

columns.name: PriceRatioOpening
columns.comment: The cumulative price adjustment multiplier at opening, used to adjust historical prices for splits.

columns.name: ActivityAmountRatio
columns.comment: The cumulative amount/quantity adjustment multiplier for the period, used to adjust historical position sizes.

columns.name: ActivityPriceRatio
columns.comment: The cumulative price adjustment multiplier for the period, used to adjust historical prices for splits.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: IsRatio
columns.comment: Indicates whether a cumulative price adjustment multiplier is applied, using the PriceRatio value from the dim_historysplitratio table, which is a multiplier to adjust historical prices for splits.

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year partition value injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: ID
columns.comment: Real customer identifier used for de-anonymization of EU/UK custody books, sourced from the bi_db_positionpnl_uk_custody_resolver table via CID.

columns.name: ReportDate
columns.comment: Business reporting date for this record (may differ from ETL insert date).

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number (ISO 6166). Unique 12-char alphanumeric code identifying a security.

columns.name: EquilendID
columns.comment: EquiLend securities lending integration ID. Updated from StocksLending. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)

columns.name: PrevBidSpreaded
columns.comment: Spread-adjusted bid price for the instrument, with the broker spread applied.

columns.name: PrevBid
columns.comment: Raw bid price before spread adjustment, used as a mid-price reference.

columns.name: PrevPriceDate
columns.comment: Calendar date of the previous price record.

columns.name: PrevDatePriceRatio
columns.comment: Cumulative price adjustment multiplier for the previous period, used to get the split-adjusted equivalent of a historical price.

columns.name: BidSpreaded
columns.comment: Spread-adjusted bid price for the instrument. The bid price with the broker spread applied. Used in P&L calculations for sell-side closing proceeds. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: Bid
columns.comment: Raw bid price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to BidSpreaded to derive the spread. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: PriceDate
columns.comment: Calendar date of the price record.

columns.name: PriceRatio
columns.comment: Cumulative price adjustment multiplier for this period. Multiply a historical price by this value to get its split-adjusted equivalent. 1.0 means no adjustment. Example: PriceRatio=0.25 means a 4:1 stock split occurred (1 old share = 4 new shares, price adjusted down to 25%). (Tier 3 -- live data, PriceLog.History.SplitRatio)

columns.name: SellCurrencyID
columns.comment: The sell-side (denomination) currency. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency(CurrencyID). For forex: the quote currency (e.g., USD in EUR/USD). For stocks: the trading denomination currency (USD, EUR, GBX). Only 67 distinct values since many assets share the same denomination. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)

objects.name: bi_output_fullname_apiresults
objects.describe_error:
