objects.name: vg_emoney_openbankingdeposit
objects.view_definition:
select
    CID,
    TransferID                                   as OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_ID,

    case
        when TransferStatusID = 10
            then 'Success'
        else 'Pending_or_Failed'
    end                                          as OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_Status,

    case
        when left(p.ExReferenceID, 2) = 'TZ' then 'Volt'
        when left(p.ExReferenceID, 2) = 'TK' then 'Tink'
        else 'Other'
    end                                          as OpenBankingDeposit_Provider, 
    Amount as OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_USDAmount , ModificationDate as OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_Date

from main.bi_db.bronze_moneytransfer_billing_transfers p

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer identifier - the user who initiated or owns the transfer. Used for customer-scoped queries: GetTransfersByCID, GetDepotIdOfLastSuccessfulTransferByCid, GetLastSuccessTransferDataByCid. Indexed for performance (IX_Billing_Transfers_CID). References an external customer system. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_ID
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing unique identifier for each transfer. NONCLUSTERED PK. Used as a secondary lookup key and in range-based monitoring queries (GetLastTransfersStatusesInPercentage scans by TransferID ranges). Current values in the ~4.88M range. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_Status
columns.comment: The current status of the open banking deposit attempt, which is ’Success’ if the TransferStatusID is 10, and ’Pending_or_Failed’ otherwise.

columns.name: OpenBankingDeposit_Provider
columns.comment: The provider of the open banking deposit, determined by the prefix of the ExReferenceID, where ’TZ’ corresponds to ’Volt’, ’TK’ corresponds to ’Tink’, and any other prefix corresponds to ’Other’.

columns.name: OpenBankingDeposit_Attempt_Date
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of the most recent modification. Initialized to GETUTCDATE() on INSERT, then auto-updated by trigger TR_Transfers_ModificationDate on every UPDATE operation. The gap between CreateDate and ModificationDate indicates processing duration. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

objects.name: vg_emoney_panel_firstdates_em1
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
    /* =========================
       Identifiers
       ========================= */
    CID,
    GCID,

    /* =========================
       FMI / FMO (eMoney POV)
       ========================= */
    FMI_Date       AS emoney_fmi_date,
    FMI_Source     AS emoney_fmi_source,
    Seniority_FMI,

    FMO_Date       AS emoney_fmo_date,
    FMO_Target     AS emoney_fmo_target,
    FMO_MOP        AS emoney_fmo_mop,
    Seniority_FMO,

    /* =========================
       Settled transaction dates
       ========================= */
    LastSettledTXDate          AS emoney_last_settled_tx_date,
    Seniority_LastTXDate,
    FirstIBANSettledTXDate     AS emoney_first_settled_tx_date,
    LastIBANSettledTXDate      AS emoney_last_settled_tx_date_iban,

    /* =========================
       Generic action sequence (1–5)
       ========================= */
    1stActionDate              AS emoney_1st_action_date,
    1stActionType              AS emoney_1st_action_type,
    1stActionUSDApproxAmount   AS emoney_1st_action_amount_usd,

    2ndActionDate              AS emoney_2nd_action_date,
    2ndActionType              AS emoney_2nd_action_type,
    2ndActionUSDApproxAmount   AS emoney_2nd_action_amount_usd,

    3rdActionDate              AS emoney_3rd_action_date,
    3rdActionType              AS emoney_3rd_action_type,
    3rdActionUSDApproxAmount   AS emoney_3rd_action_amount_usd,

    4thActionDate              AS emoney_4th_action_date,
    4thActionType              AS emoney_4th_action_type,
    4thActionUSDApproxAmount   AS emoney_4th_action_amount_usd,

    5thActionDate              AS emoney_5th_action_date,
    5thActionType              AS emoney_5th_action_type,
    5thActionUSDApproxAmount   AS emoney_5th_action_amount_usd,

    /* =========================
       Card lifecycle & actions (1–5)
       ========================= */
    CardActivationTime         AS emoney_card_activation_date,

    Card1stActionDate          AS emoney_card_1st_action_date,
    Card1stActionType          AS emoney_card_1st_action_type,
    Card1stActionUSDApproxAmount AS emoney_card_1st_action_amount_usd,

    Card2ndActionDate          AS emoney_card_2nd_action_date,
    Card2ndActionType          AS emoney_card_2nd_action_type,
    Card2ndActionUSDApproxAmount AS emoney_card_2nd_action_amount_usd,

    Card3rdActionDate          AS emoney_card_3rd_action_date,
    Card3rdActionType          AS emoney_card_3rd_action_type,
    Card3rdActionUSDApproxAmount AS emoney_card_3rd_action_amount_usd,

    Card4thActionDate          AS emoney_card_4th_action_date,
    Card4thActionType          AS emoney_card_4th_action_type,
    Card4thActionUSDApproxAmount AS emoney_card_4th_action_amount_usd,

    Card5thActionDate          AS emoney_card_5th_action_date,
    Card5thActionType          AS emoney_card_5th_action_type,
    Card5thActionUSDApproxAmount AS emoney_card_5th_action_amount_usd

FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_panel_firstdates

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Renamed from RealCID in DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID. Identifies the customer across all eToro platforms (trading, crypto, fiat). Part of the unique constraint with AccountGuid. Used in Confluence queries as the primary customer lookup key. (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatAccount)

columns.name: emoney_fmi_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s first settled money-in transaction, where the transaction type is either 5 (TransferReceived) or 7 (PaymentReceived), the transaction status is 2, and the holder amount is not zero.

columns.name: emoney_fmi_source
columns.comment: Origin classification of the first money-in transaction, either ’TP’ (internal eToro transfer) or ’External’ (external payment).

columns.name: Seniority_FMI
columns.comment: Months elapsed between FMI_Date and the SP run date. DATEDIFF(MONTH, FMI_Date, @Date). NULL when FMI_Date is NULL. Computed at INSERT time - recalculate DATEDIFF directly for real-time values. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Panel_FirstDates)

columns.name: emoney_fmo_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s first settled money-out transaction, where the transaction type is one of 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, or 13, the transaction status is 2, and the holder amount is not zero.

columns.name: emoney_fmo_target
columns.comment: Destination classification of the first money-out transaction, either ’TP’ (internal transfer to eToro user) or ’External’ (external transfer).

columns.name: emoney_fmo_mop
columns.comment: Method of payment for the first money-out transaction, either ’Card’ (transaction types 1, 2, 3, or 4), ’IBAN’ (transaction types 6 or 8), or ’DirectDebit’ (transaction type 13).

columns.name: Seniority_FMO
columns.comment: Months elapsed between FMO_Date and the SP run date. DATEDIFF(MONTH, FMO_Date, @Date). NULL when FMO_Date is NULL. Computed at INSERT time. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Panel_FirstDates)

columns.name: emoney_last_settled_tx_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s most recent settled transaction across all types, where the transaction status is 2 and the holder amount is not zero.

columns.name: Seniority_LastTXDate
columns.comment: Months elapsed between LastSettledTXDate and the SP run date. DATEDIFF(MONTH, LastSettledTXDate, @Date). Accounts with Seniority_LastTXDate <= 3 are typically considered active. Computed at INSERT time. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Panel_FirstDates)

columns.name: emoney_first_settled_tx_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s first settled IBAN-rail transaction (transaction types 5, 6, 7, or 8), or null if no IBAN activity exists.

columns.name: emoney_last_settled_tx_date_iban
columns.comment: Date of the account’s most recent settled IBAN-rail transaction (transaction types 5, 6, 7, or 8), or null if no IBAN activity exists.

columns.name: emoney_1st_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s first settled transaction, ranked in ascending order by transaction status modification time.

columns.name: emoney_1st_action_type
columns.comment: Type of the account’s first settled transaction (e.g., CardPayment, Transfer, PaymentReceived).

columns.name: emoney_1st_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: Approximate USD value of the account’s first settled transaction, calculated by rounding the holder amount multiplied by the mid-rate to 2 decimal places.

columns.name: emoney_2nd_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s second settled transaction, ranked in ascending order, or null if fewer than 2 settled transactions exist.

columns.name: emoney_2nd_action_type
columns.comment: TxType name of the 2nd settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 2.

columns.name: emoney_2nd_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD approximate amount of the 2nd settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 2.

columns.name: emoney_3rd_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 3rd settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 3.

columns.name: emoney_3rd_action_type
columns.comment: TxType name of the 3rd settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 3.

columns.name: emoney_3rd_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD approximate amount of the 3rd settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 3.

columns.name: emoney_4th_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 4th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 4.

columns.name: emoney_4th_action_type
columns.comment: TxType name of the 4th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 4.

columns.name: emoney_4th_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD approximate amount of the 4th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 4.

columns.name: emoney_5th_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 5th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 5.

columns.name: emoney_5th_action_type
columns.comment: TxType name of the 5th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 5.

columns.name: emoney_5th_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD approximate amount of the 5th settled transaction, NULL if fewer than 5.

columns.name: emoney_card_activation_date
columns.comment: Timestamp when the card reached activated status, determined by CardStatusID=1, otherwise NULL.

columns.name: emoney_card_1st_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the account’s 1st settled card-rail transaction, where transaction type is one of [1,2,3,4], ranked in ascending order.

columns.name: emoney_card_1st_action_type
columns.comment: Transaction type of the 1st settled card transaction, with possible values: CardPayment, ContactlessPayment, CardCashWithdrawal, CardRefund.

columns.name: emoney_card_1st_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD approximate amount of the 1st settled card transaction.

columns.name: emoney_card_2nd_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 2nd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 2 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_2nd_action_type
columns.comment: Transaction type of the 2nd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 2 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_2nd_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD amount of the 2nd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 2 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_3rd_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 3rd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 3 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_3rd_action_type
columns.comment: Transaction type of the 3rd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 3 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_3rd_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD amount of the 3rd settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 3 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_4th_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 4th settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 4 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_4th_action_type
columns.comment: Transaction type of the 4th settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 4 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_4th_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD amount of the 4th settled card transaction, or NULL if fewer than 4 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_5th_action_date
columns.comment: Date of the 5th settled card transaction, or NULL if there are fewer than 5 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_5th_action_type
columns.comment: Transaction type of the 5th settled card transaction, or NULL if there are fewer than 5 card transactions.

columns.name: emoney_card_5th_action_amount_usd
columns.comment: USD amount of the 5th settled card transaction, or NULL if there are fewer than 5 card transactions.

objects.name: vg_emoney_potentialclients_attributes
objects.view_definition:
WITH base_customers AS (
    -- Base population = all customers in eMoney-eligible countries
    SELECT
        dc.RealCID AS CID,
        dpl.Name AS Club,
        co.Name AS CountryName,
        dc.PlayerStatusID,
        dc.VerificationLevelID,
        dc.IsValidCustomer,
        dc.CountryID,
        dc.RegulationID,
        dc.ScreeningStatusID,
        dc.AccountTypeID,
        dc.PhoneVerifiedID,
        dc.POBCountryID
    FROM main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked dc
    INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dpl
        ON dc.PlayerLevelID = dpl.PlayerLevelID
    LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country co
        ON dc.CountryID = co.CountryID
    WHERE dc.CountryID IN (
        95,54,119,79,154,184,165,57,67,112,143,191,
        100,52,135,196,32,218,72,185,82,13,74,117,
        19,118,126,102,94,55,164,168,12,197
    )
),

eligibility_au_only AS (
    -- Eligibility logic applies ONLY to Australia (CountryID = 12)
    SELECT
        *,
        CASE
            WHEN CountryID = 12
             AND IsValidCustomer = 1
             AND RegulationID = 10
             AND PlayerStatusID IN (1,12,5)
             AND VerificationLevelID = 3
             AND ScreeningStatusID = 1
             AND AccountTypeID = 1
             AND PhoneVerifiedID IN (1,2)
             AND POBCountryID IS NOT NULL
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS IsEligible_AU
    FROM base_customers
),

etm_accounts AS (
    -- All valid eMoney (ETM) accounts
    SELECT
        mda.CID,
        1 AS HasETMAccount,
        mda.AccountSubProgramID,
        mda.AccountCreateDateID
    FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_dim_account mda
    INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked fsc
        ON mda.CID = fsc.RealCID
    INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_range dr
        ON dr.DateRangeID = fsc.DateRangeID
       AND mda.AccountCreateDateID BETWEEN dr.FromDateID AND dr.ToDateID
    WHERE mda.GCID_Unique_Count = 1
      AND mda.IsValidETM = 1
      AND mda.IsTestAccount = 0
)

SELECT
    e.CID,
    e.CountryName,
    e.Club,
    e.PlayerStatusID,
    e.VerificationLevelID,
    e.IsEligible_AU AS IsEligible,
    COALESCE(a.HasETMAccount,0) AS HasETMAccount,
    a.AccountSubProgramID,
    a.AccountCreateDateID
FROM eligibility_au_only e
LEFT JOIN etm_accounts a
    ON e.CID = a.CID

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: AccountSubProgramID
columns.comment: Specific sub-program variant: 1-16 (e.g., Card Premium UK, IBAN EU Green). FK to eMoney_dbo.SubPrograms. NULL if not yet assigned to a specific variant. DWH note: current sub-program; ISNULL(latest FiatAccountsProperties record, original FiatAccount.SubProgramId). (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatAccount)

columns.name: AccountCreateDateID
columns.comment: YYYYMMDD integer date key for AccountCreateDate. DWH-derived: CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), AccountCreateTime, 112). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Dim_Account)

objects.name: vg_emoney_txs
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
    mdt.CID,
    mdt.GCID,
    mdt.TxStatusModificationDate,
    mdt.USDAmountApprox AS TxAmountInUSD,
    mdt.TransactionID,
    mdt.IsTxSettled,
    mdt.TxType,
    mdt.TxTypeID,
    mdt.HolderCurrencyISO,
    mdt.LocalCurrencyISO
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_dim_transaction mdt
WHERE mdt.IsValidETM = 1
  AND mdt.IsTxSettled = 1

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Renamed from RealCID in DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer. Passthrough via eMoney_Dim_Account snapshot. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID. Identifies the customer across all eToro platforms (trading, crypto, fiat). Part of the unique constraint with AccountGuid. Used in Confluence queries as the primary customer lookup key. Passthrough via eMoney_Dim_Account snapshot (Step 01). (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatAccount)

columns.name: TxStatusModificationDate
columns.comment: Date portion of TxStatusModificationTime. DWH-derived: CAST(TransactionOccured AS DATE). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TransactionID
columns.comment: Surrogate key for the fiat transaction from FiatDwhDB.dbo.FiatTransactions.Id. Each transaction appears exactly once in this table (latest status only). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: IsTxSettled
columns.comment: 1 if the current transaction status is Settled (TxStatusID=2), else 0. ETL CASE expression. KEY DIFFERENCE from eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status (which has FiatTransactionStatusRunningID at this position instead). 98.3% of transactions are Settled. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxType
columns.comment: Transaction type display name for TxTypeID, resolved from External_FiatDwhDB_Dictionary_TransactionTypes.Name. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxTypeID
columns.comment: Transaction type identifier. 1=CardPayment, 2=ContactlessPayment, 3=CardCashWithdrawal, 4=CardRefund, 5=Transfer, 6=TransferReceived, 7=PaymentReceived, 8=Payment, 9=Refund, 10=Fee, 11=CreditBankAccount, 12=DebitBankAccount, 13=OnlinePayment, 14=DirectDebit (15=CryptoToFiat via dictionary). Passthrough from FiatTransactions.TransactionTypeId. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: HolderCurrencyISO
columns.comment: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the holder's balance currency (e.g., 826=GBP, 978=EUR, 208=DKK). Passthrough from FiatTransactionsStatuses.HolderCurrency (latest event, RNDesc=1). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: LocalCurrencyISO
columns.comment: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the local transaction currency (e.g., the merchant's currency for card transactions). Passthrough from FiatTransactionsStatuses.TransactionCurrency. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

objects.name: vg_emoneydimaccount_forgenie
objects.view_definition:
SELECT 
    mda.CID,
    mda.GCID,
    mda.AccountSubProgram,
    mda.AccountCreateDate,
    mda.RegAccountSubProgram,
    COALESCE(mda.CurrencyBalanceStatus, 'Active') AS CurrencyBalanceStatus,
    mda.CurrencyBalanceISODesc, 
    mda.CurrencyBalanceID
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_dim_account mda
WHERE mda.IsValidETM = 1 
  AND mda.GCID_Unique_Count = 1 
  AND mda.IsTestAccount = 0

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Renamed from RealCID in DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID. Identifies the customer across all eToro platforms (trading, crypto, fiat). Part of the unique constraint with AccountGuid. Used in Confluence queries as the primary customer lookup key. (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatAccount)

columns.name: AccountSubProgram
columns.comment: Sub-program display name for AccountSubProgramID, resolved from eMoney_dbo.SubPrograms (16 active programs across UK/EU/AUS regions). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Dim_Account)

columns.name: AccountCreateDate
columns.comment: Date portion of AccountCreateTime. DWH-derived: CAST(AccountCreateTime AS DATE). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Dim_Account)

columns.name: RegAccountSubProgram
columns.comment: Sub-program display name for RegAccountSubProgramID, resolved from eMoney_dbo.SubPrograms. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Dim_Account)

columns.name: CurrencyBalanceStatus
columns.comment: The display name for the currency balance status, resolved from the eMoney Dictionary, using the CurrencyBalanceStatusID, and defaulting to ’Active’ if the CurrencyBalanceStatus is null.

columns.name: CurrencyBalanceISODesc
columns.comment: Currency display name resolved from eMoney_Currency_Instrument_Mapping_Static via CurrencyBalanceISOCode (where SellCurrencyID=1). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_Dim_Account)

columns.name: CurrencyBalanceID
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing surrogate PK. Referenced by FiatTransactions, FiatCurrencyBalancesStatuses, CurrencyBalancesProvidersMapping, PaymentSpecifications, FiatBankAccount, and BalanceReports. (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatCurrencyBalances)

objects.name: vg_emoneydimtransaction_forgenie
objects.view_definition:
SELECT 
    mdt.CID,
    mdt.GCID,
    mdt.TxTypeID,
    mdt.TxType,
    CASE 
        WHEN mdt.TxTypeID IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 13) THEN mdt.TxType || ' - eToro Debit Card Transaction'
        WHEN mdt.TxType = 'Payment' THEN 'Payment - IBAN to External (Outgoing Payment)'
        WHEN mdt.TxType = 'PaymentReceived' THEN 'PaymentReceived - External to IBAN (Incoming Payment)'
        WHEN mdt.TxType = 'Transfer' THEN 'Transfer - IBAN to Trading Platform (Internal Transfer Out)'
        WHEN mdt.TxType = 'TransferReceived' THEN 'TransferReceived - Trading Platform to IBAN (Internal Transfer In)'
        ELSE mdt.TxType
    END AS TxTypeDescription,
    mdt.USDAmountApprox,
    mdt.HolderAmount,
    mdt.HolderCurrencyDesc,
    mdt.MerchantID,
    mdt.TxStatusModificationTime,
    mdt.TxLabel,
    mdt.MoneyMoveDirection,
    mdt.USDRateApprox
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_emoney_dbo_emoney_dim_transaction mdt
WHERE mdt.IsValidETM = 1 
  AND mdt.IsTxSettled = 1

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Renamed from RealCID in DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer. Passthrough via eMoney_Dim_Account snapshot. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID. Identifies the customer across all eToro platforms (trading, crypto, fiat). Part of the unique constraint with AccountGuid. Used in Confluence queries as the primary customer lookup key. Passthrough via eMoney_Dim_Account snapshot (Step 01). (Tier 1 - dbo.FiatAccount)

columns.name: TxTypeID
columns.comment: Transaction type identifier. 1=CardPayment, 2=ContactlessPayment, 3=CardCashWithdrawal, 4=CardRefund, 5=Transfer, 6=TransferReceived, 7=PaymentReceived, 8=Payment, 9=Refund, 10=Fee, 11=CreditBankAccount, 12=DebitBankAccount, 13=OnlinePayment, 14=DirectDebit (15=CryptoToFiat via dictionary). Passthrough from FiatTransactions.TransactionTypeId. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxType
columns.comment: Transaction type display name for TxTypeID, resolved from External_FiatDwhDB_Dictionary_TransactionTypes.Name. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxTypeDescription
columns.comment: A transaction type description, where the type is determined by the TxTypeID:

columns.name: USDAmountApprox
columns.comment: Approximate USD equivalent of HolderAmount at TxLocalDate. ROUND(HolderAmount × (Ask+Bid)/2, 2) using DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit mid-rate. NULL for DKK (no matching instrument). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: HolderAmount
columns.comment: Amount debited/credited to the holder's balance in HolderCurrency. Negative = debit (MoneyOut); positive = credit (MoneyIn). Passthrough from FiatTransactionsStatuses.HolderAmount (latest event, RNDesc=1). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: HolderCurrencyDesc
columns.comment: Currency display name for HolderCurrencyISO, resolved via eMoney_Currency_Mapping_ISO.CurrencyAlphaThreeCode from the instrument mapping COALESCE(buy-side, sell-side). (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: MerchantID
columns.comment: Merchant identifier from FiatTransactions.MerchantId. Populated for card POS and online transactions; NULL for bank transfers and internal transactions. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxStatusModificationTime
columns.comment: Timestamp of the latest status change event (FiatTransactionsStatuses.TransactionOccured, RNDesc=1 by TransactionOccured DESC). The de facto "last updated" timestamp for this transaction's state. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: TxLabel
columns.comment: Free-text label from FiatTransactions.Label. Contains merchant names, IBAN references, or internal notes depending on transaction type. May contain PII. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: MoneyMoveDirection
columns.comment: Direction of money flow based on HolderAmount: HolderAmount < 0 = MoneyOut; HolderAmount > 0 = MoneyIn; HolderAmount = 0 = Error. ETL CASE in Step 04. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

columns.name: USDRateApprox
columns.comment: USD mid-rate used for USDAmountApprox. ROUND((Ask+Bid)/2, 2) from DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit at TxLocalDate. NULL for DKK transactions. (Tier 2 - SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction)

objects.name: vg_fact_billingdeposit_for_genie
objects.view_definition: select * from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_fact_billingdeposit

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID. Identifies the eToro customer who made this deposit. References DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: CurrencyID
columns.comment: Currency of the deposit amount. References DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency. 1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, etc. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: Commission
columns.comment: Commission charged on this deposit. Default 0 in production. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: Approved
columns.comment: Legacy approval flag, superseded by PaymentStatusID=2. NULL for most modern records. Retained for backward compatibility. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ModificationDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of the most recent modification to this deposit record. Used by ETL for incremental detection. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ModificationDateID
columns.comment: ETL key. Integer YYYYMMDD derived from ModificationDate (CONVERT(INT, date)). Used for rolling-window DELETE+INSERT. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: FundingID
columns.comment: Payment instrument (credit card, bank account, e-wallet) used for this deposit. References Billing.Funding. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ExchangeRate
columns.comment: Exchange rate from deposit currency to USD at processing time. Cannot be 0 in production. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: DepositID
columns.comment: Primary distribution key (HASH). Uniquely identifies each deposit attempt. PK in production (Billing.Deposit.DepositID IDENTITY). Clustered index key in DWH. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ProcessorValueDate
columns.comment: Value date from the payment processor. Mandatory for offline/wire deposits. NULL for instant payment methods. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: DepotID
columns.comment: Acquirer/gateway configuration used for this deposit. Validated at insert against DepotToCurrency in production. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: SecuredCardDataAsString
columns.comment: [UNVERIFIED] Encrypted/hashed card data from FundingData XML. (Tier 4 — column name)

columns.name: BinCodeAsString
columns.comment: Card BIN code (first 6-8 digits) from FundingData XML. Used to JOIN Dim_CountryBin for BankName + CardCategory. (Tier 5 — domain expert)

columns.name: BinCountryIDAsInteger
columns.comment: Country ID from BIN lookup, from FundingData XML. (Tier 3 — SP code)

columns.name: CardTypeIDAsInteger
columns.comment: Card network: 1=Visa, 2=MasterCard, 3=Diners. From FundingData XML. FK to Dim_CardType. (Tier 2 — Dim lookup)

columns.name: PaymentStatusID
columns.comment: Current deposit status. Key values: 1=New, 2=Approved (73%), 3=Decline, 5=InProcess, 11=Chargeback, 12=Refund, 13=Pending, 35=DeclineByRRE (10.2%). Full 39-value enum in upstream wiki. NC index key. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ManagerID
columns.comment: Operations manager who processed this deposit. 0=automated. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: RiskManagementStatusID
columns.comment: Result of the pre-processing risk management check. 69 distinct risk reason codes. NULL=no risk check recorded. Key codes: 1=Success, 35=DeclineByRRE, 47=ML, 49=CustomerToFundingViolation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Deposit amount in the deposit currency (CurrencyID). As of 2025-04-17, capped via CASE expression in ETL to prevent extreme outlier values from distorting aggregations. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: PaymentDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when the deposit was submitted (set at INSERT in production). Not the approval time. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.comment: Customer IP address at deposit time, as a 32-bit integer. Used for fraud detection. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ClearingHouseEffectiveDate
columns.comment: Settlement date assigned by the clearing house. NULL for instant payment methods. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: IsFTD
columns.comment: First Time Deposit flag. 1=this was the customer's very first approved deposit (drives marketing attribution). 0=repeat deposit or ineligible type. ~60.6% of deposits are FTD=1 in Billing.Deposit. Stored as int in DWH (vs. bit in production). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: RefundVerificationCode
columns.comment: Verification code for refund correlation. Set by UpdateRefundDetails. NULL for non-refunded deposits. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: MatchStatusID
columns.comment: PSP reconciliation match status. Default 0=Unmatched; 3=Matched. Used for provider reconciliation workflows. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: BonusStatusID
columns.comment: Promotional bonus status. Values: 0=New, 1=Approved, 2=Declined, 3=Reverted. Only 239 non-zero records in production. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: BonusAmount
columns.comment: Bonus amount credited with this deposit. NULL when no bonus applies. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: BonusErrorCode
columns.comment: Error code when bonus processing fails (BonusStatusID=2). NULL when bonus succeeds or not attempted. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: ExTransactionID
columns.comment: External (payment provider) transaction ID. Used for provider-side reconciliation and dispute resolution. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Billing.Deposit)

columns.name: FundingTypeID
columns.comment: Type of payment instrument. Sourced from Billing.Funding.FundingTypeID (not from Billing.Deposit directly). Categorizes the deposit by payment method (credit card, wire, ACH, etc.). (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: IsRefundExcluded
columns.comment: Whether this deposit is excluded from refund eligibility. Sourced from Billing.Funding.IsRefundExcluded. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: DocumentRequired
columns.comment: Whether documentation was required for this deposit/funding instrument. Sourced from Billing.Funding.DocumentRequired. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: ETL `GETDATE()` at Ext_FBD build. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: ExpirationDateID
columns.comment: Integer date ID derived from ExpirationDateAsString XML attribute via a complex formula in SP. Represents card expiration date as YYYYMMDD. NC index key. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: CountryIDAsInteger

columns.comment: Bank address from FundingData XML. (Tier 3 — SP code)

columns.comment: Bank code (numeric) from FundingData XML. (Tier 3 — SP code)

columns.name: ExchangeFee

columns.name: ProtocolMIDSettingsID

columns.name: FunnelID

columns.name: AmountUSD
